input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.1.4
            TITLE: teams may not work on their vehicles once their endurance event has started

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.1.4: Teams may not work on their vehicles once their Endurance event has started
D.12.1.4 Teams may not work on their vehicles once their Endurance event has started

final_answer: Teams may not work on their vehicles once their Endurance event has started
